FASTag annual pass gets pricier: Here's what changes from April 1
description: The National Highways Authority of India is increasing the FASTag Annual Pass fee. Starting April 1, 2026, the pass will cost Rs 3,075. This prepaid toll plan is for non-commercial private vehicles. The revision aligns with National Highways Fee Rules. Over 56 lakh users have adopted the pass. The new rate applies to eligible vehicles at approximately 1,150 fee plazas.

title: Ice patches on melting glaciers greater threat than thought: ISRO scientists
description: Researchers from the Regional (West) and National Remote Sensing Centres of ISRO have found that the presence of exposed ice patches on the Srikanta Glacier immediately before the floods of August 5 was a signal of ongoing deglaciation and a direct indicator in the landscape of the likelihood of such floods

title: Sidney Crosby reacts after Radko Gudas hit ends Auston Matthews’ season
description: The NHL handed Radko Gudas a five-game suspension after a kneeing play left Auston Matthews with a season-ending MCL tear. The incident also revived anger tied to Sidney Crosby’s earlier knee injury, which forced him to miss Canada’s Olympic gold medal game. Both the Pittsburgh Penguins and Toronto Maple Leafs now face major lineup gaps, and many fans believe the punishment does little to reflect the long-term damage caused by the collisions.

title: Perplexity AI CEO agrees that Computer Science is gradually returning to its roots
description: AI is rapidly automating coding's routine tasks, pushing software engineering back towards its mathematical roots. Experts predict AI could soon handle most end-to-end coding, with some engineers already code-free. While LLMs still struggle with complex design, this shift is prompting a rethink in computer science education, emphasizing logic over syntax.

title: Why are more foreign students choosing India for higher education
FBI is investigating malware hidden in games on Steam: Suspected titles, safety tips for gamers and more
description: The FBI is investigating malware embedded in games on Steam, with a focus on potential victims between May 2024 and January 2026. Several games, including BlockBlasters and Chemia, have been identified as containing the malicious software. The agency is urging anyone who may have installed these games or has relevant information to come forward.

title: Albert Pujols and Nicole Fernandez net worth: MLB couple’s wealth and lifestyle
description: Albert Pujols, a wealthy MLB star with a $100 million net worth, married Nicole Fernandez in 2023. Fernandez, who has a career in journalism and film, also maintains a high net worth. The couple leads a lavish lifestyle, supported by Pujols' extensive MLB earnings, endorsements, business ventures, and post-retirement executive roles.
